business.offer: Professional business website: $997 setup + $247/mo maintenance, hosting, support. Fixed pricing. Payment only via OrenGen official checkout.
business.fulfillment: OrenGen builds, delivers, supports. Most sites live in five days or less (approved claim, Handbook).

salesPartner.comp: 25% of setup + 25% of monthly residual, for life. Standard close: $249.25 upfront + $61.75/mo. NOTHING else — no other comp mechanics exist.
guardrails: Reps sell the website only ($997 + $247/mo) — never discuss commissions, upsells, or add-ons with prospects
No income/earnings claims to prospects; FTC income disclaimer on every partner-facing marketing surface

referralPartner.comp: Rank-based: Catalyst→Sovereign, setup % + residual % + army overrides per src/types/index.ts

stack.crm: GoHighLevel (Law 2: the only CRM). Pipeline 5kXJgKVijokWag4enbJ5, stage IDs in Coolify env
stack.payments: Stripe checkout + Stripe Connect Express payouts; NET-15 commission maturity

decisionsOpen: W-9 separate doc vs Stripe-collected (blocks docs email)
Rep GHL access: shared seat vs per-rep seats (blocks CRM handoff step)
GHL-Won mints conversion without payment: keep or env-gate
